INPADOC data   TooltipThe EPO does not accept any responsibility for the accuracy of legal status data relating to the post-grant phase, including but not limited to their completeness and fitness for specific purposes, nor can it guarantee that such data are up to date. For authoritative information, please refer to the relevant national patent authority.
Event date:21.01.2026 
Event description:DIVISIONAL APPLICATION: REFERENCE TO EARLIER APPLICATION

Country of Ref Document:EP
Kind Code of Ref Document:P

Event description:DESIGNATED CONTRACTING STATES
